
# index

This file documents the `mcidoc`, a LaTeX class for producing guideline
compliant documentation for M.Sc and B.Sc students. 

This is Version 2026.SS, last updated on 15.06.2026, of The mcidoc
Manual, for use with LuaHBTeX, Version 1.24.0 (TeX Live 2026) .

Copyright 2026, D.T. McGuiness, Ph.D

> This program may be distributed and/or modified under the conditions of the
> LaTeX Project Public License, either version 1.1 of this license or (at your
> option) any later version. The latest version of this license is in
> <http://www.latex-project.org/lppl.txt> and version 1.1 or later is part of
> all distributions of LaTeX version 1999/06/01 or later.
> 
> This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT
> ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS
> FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
